advice.context_notes: He was giving me life advice.

advice.text: Learn, master and teach - figure out how you learn the best, master the concepts you have a passion in and teach others around you to stand out as a leader!
advice.context_notes: Came from life experiences and it helps you feel more CONFIDENT in your abilities

advice.text: Never underestimate the power of connection. Speak to others genuinely, not transactionally. Know when to listen and when to use your voice. The stars are the limit, keep shining.
advice.context_notes: I asked her during my Microsoft visit :)

advice.text: It's better to be too kind than it is to be too cruel - both will come back to you in some way. Even still, always be firm in your boundaries.
advice.context_notes: This is my dawg right here

advice.text: No one has crossed you as bad as you've crossed God, and He always forgives you. Remember that when you're deciding whether or not you can let something go.
advice.context_notes: I was opening up with her about how difficult it is to let go of people who have hurt me in the past.

advice.text: We are all just one decision away from being in someone else's shoes. Never forget we are all the sum of our decisions.
advice.context_notes: We were sitting by her desk

advice.text: Don't let your past determine your future. One thing has NOTHING to do with the other.
advice.context_notes: We were chilling at i.c Stars

advice.text: You'll have good and bad days but if you get up and try then it was a good day. Don't be your biggest critic.
advice.context_notes: We were chilling on the couch in the dining room talking.
